content:
🚨 WE ARE HIRING – SECURITY GUARDS 🚨

We are looking for dedicated, disciplined, and vigilant Security Guards to join our team and help maintain a safe and secure environment.

📍 Location: Sitapur & Lakhimpur (U.P.)
👥 Vacancies: 10

✅ Eligibility:
• Minimum 10th Pass (12th & UG Preferred)
• Age: 25–50 Years
• Physically Fit & Alert
• Experience in Security Services Preferred
• Ex-Servicemen Preferred

📞 Contact: 7800002105
📧 Email: info@naimish.org.in

If you have a strong sense of responsibility and commitment towards safety and security, we encourage you to apply.

#Hiring #SecurityGuardJobs #JobOpening #SitapurJobs #LakhimpurJobs #SecurityServices #CareerOpportunity #UrgentHiring #JobsInUP #Recruitment
